title: astragalus humilis
intro: Astragalus humilis, also known as dwarf milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of western North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus humilis include enhancing immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus humilis can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and prevent diseases.
